title: Sales Representative (Electronic Manufacturer)
description:
We are a well‑established and reputable electronics manufacturer with a strong global presence. Our Singapore office operates as a key regional hub, supporting marketing, development, production, and distribution activities for high‑quality electronic components used across various industries.

As we continue to expand, we are looking for a motivated and driven Sales Representative to join our team and contribute to our business growth.

Working Location: Bendemeer Road, Singapore
Working Hours: Monday - Friday

Key Responsibilities:

Sales & Business Development

  • Achieve sales targets set by the company
  • Maintain strong relationships with existing customer accounts
  • Identify and develop new business opportunities
  • Participate in contract negotiations
  • Review terms and conditions before implementation

Customer & Internal Coordination

  • Prepare and provide timely quotations to customer inquiries
  • Coordinate with internal teams to address customer needs and new project requirements
  • Resolve customer issues promptly and professionally
  • Prepare and submit reports to the Manager


Job Requirements:

  • Diploma in Sales, Customer Service, or Administration
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Teams)
  • Experience with D365 is an added advantage
  • Able to thrive in a fast‑paced environment
  • Strong time‑management and multitasking abilities
  • Independent, disciplined, and able to meet tight deadlines
  • Excellent communication, analytical, and problem‑solving skills
  • Detail‑oriented, resourceful, and proactive
  • Positive attitude with strong customer‑service mindset
  • Shows initiative and leadership qualities

Ready to take the next step in your career with a dynamic and forward‑thinking team?
🔗 Click “Apply Now” to submit your application.
📩 Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

JAC Recruitment Pte. Ltd.

postedCompany.description:
JAC is an international recruitment consultancy with over 45 years of specialised recruitment experience across Asia and Europe. We have over 1,200 expert consultants who have a deep cultural understanding of the local markets they operate in. Combined with our regional network and specialised industry focus we are renowned for placing highly skilled permanent and contracting staff into specialist positions.

In Singapore, we cover the Banking and Financial Services, Corporate Services, Digital and Information Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Industrial, Sales & Marketing sectors. We also recruit for contract roles and have a dedicated team that can assist with hiring for Japanese-language skills.

Our job board is updated daily so you can stay updated on jobs as they become available and find the next best role for you.

EA License number: 90C3026
